steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage names sticky catchfly as a neighboring species that grows alongside common cow-wheat. The question asks where this pairing was studied — that location must come from the table.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Spain.: the Spain row pairs Bermuda buttercup and white rocket, not sticky catchfly and common cow-wheat. ✗
  • Choice B — the United States.: the U.S. row pairs Virginia spring beauty and star chickweed. ✗
  • Choice C — Japan.: Japan does not appear in the table at all. ✗
  • Choice D — Sweden.: the Sweden row lists sticky catchfly (neighboring species) alongside common cow-wheat (target species) — an exact match. ✓
That matches Choice D — Sweden..
